project.name: llm-gateway-advisor
project.goal: 实现一个桥接 Claude Code/Codex/OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 和 DeepSeek/OpenAI/Anthropic/OpenRouter/GLM 等 LLM provider 的 API 网关，并在网关内实现 advisor 编排能力。

decisions.advisor_tool_goal: behaviorally equivalent, not full official schema compatibility

pr_body_sections.heading: User Stories & Acceptance Criteria
pr_body_sections.source: REQUIREMENTS.md ## User Stories || REQUIREMENTS.md ## Acceptance Criteria
pr_body_sections.fallback: - Acceptance criteria are covered by the linked requirements and verification evidence.

pr_body_sections.heading: Success Metrics & Release Criteria
pr_body_sections.source: REQUIREMENTS.md ## Definition of Done || VERIFICATION.md ## Release Criteria
pr_body_sections.fallback: - Release when automated verification and required manual checks pass.

open_questions.question: FastAPI 作为 ingress 层时，对 Anthropic SSE event ordering 与 backpressure 的实现复杂度是否可接受？
LiteLLM 是否足以承载 v1 所需的 provider adapter 能力，尤其是 streaming、usage 提取和错误归一化？
session ledger 在 v1 采用纯内存还是可插拔持久化接口？
